Uses of Package
reciprocal.geometry

Packages that use reciprocal.geometry
Package
Description
reciprocal.geometry
Geometry shapes like circles and rectangle
  • Classes in reciprocal.geometry used by reciprocal.geometry
    Class
    Description
    AbstractCircle
    Base class for circles
    AbstractRectangle
    Base class for rectangles
    BigCircle
    Immutable implementation of a circle which uses BigDecimal as type for its radius
    BigCircle.NonNullBigCircleComparator
    Comparator which rejects null
    BigCircle.NullableBigCircleComparator
    Comparator which accepts null
    Circle
    Immutable implementation of a circle which uses Double as type for its radius
    Circle.NonNullCircleComparator
    Comparator which rejects null
    Circle.NullableCircleComparator
    Comparator which accepts null
